summary: Comprehensive testing of TeacherHubPro Enhanced Create Assignment dialog with Build Questions and Upload File features. Backend API tests: 15/16 passed. Frontend UI tests: All critical features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 400 for invalid filename format instead of 404 for non-existent file - acceptable behavior as it validates format first

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console (span/th/td nesting) - doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings exist in Gradebook.js table structure - may need review of how dynamic content is rendered in table elements
seed_data_creation: Test assignments were created and cleaned up during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Create Assignment dialog with Build Questions and Upload File tabs tested comprehensively. Backend APIs for file upload (/api/upload-file) and assignment creation with questions/attachments arrays working correctly. UI elements properly render all question types (Multiple Choice, True/False, Short Answer, Essay) and file upload area.

upload_file_tab.accepted_types: PDF, DOC, DOCX, PPT, PPTX, XLS, XLSX, PNG, JPG
